failed_attempts.sql: WITH comments AS (SELECT publication_id FROM commentGROUP BY publication_idHAVING SUM CASE WHEN num_likes < 0 THEN num_likes ELSE -1 END > 25ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN num_likes IS NULL OR num_likes < 1 THEN 200 ELSE -200 * num_likes/1000 END) DESC,  visited_at ORDER BY 2 DESC), hate_profiles AS (SELECT c.publication_idFROM comments cJOIN publication p ON c.publication_id = p.idGROUP BY c.publication_idHAVING COUNT(DISTINCT  c.profile_id) > 3ORDER BY count(*) DESC)SELECT DISTINCT profile.id AS profile_id, p.num_followers - cnt.num_followers AS hate_factorFROM profile JOIN hat h ON hate_profiles-publication_id=h.publication_idJOIN publication p ON p.id = h.publication_idJOIN (SELECT publication_id , COUNT(DISTINCT comment_id) as num_comments FROM commentgroup by publication_id ORDER BY 1 DESC, visited_at ORDER BY 2 DESC) cnt ON p.id = cnt.publication_idWHERE publication_id IN (select h.Publication_Id from hate_profiles);
